rules: status colour is reserved for state, never decoration
no more than one accent hue per screen
danger may only be used for destructive or failed states
tabular numerals mandatory in tables and KPI figures
max two type weights per view
radius tokens only; arbitrary px radius is a debt finding
sharp, rectilinear layout favoured over rounded blobs
all spacing must resolve to a 4px multiple from the scale
table row padding fixed at 8px vertical
tables stay flat; only menus and dialogs use overlay

iconography: 16px line icons, 1.5px stroke, monochrome, no filled novelty glyphs
imagery: minimal; avatars and small status glyphs only, no marketing photography in app shell
content_tone: concise, factual, second person, no exclamation marks, action-first labels
motion_character: restrained and functional; 120-180ms ease-out transitions, motion only to clarify state change or spatial relationship, never to entertain
confirmation_patterns: inline optimistic update with undo for reversible actions
modal confirmation only for destructive or bulk-irreversible actions
error_patterns: non-blocking banner for recoverable load errors with retry
preserve user input on failure, never clear the form
every async surface declares loading, empty, and error states
navigation_patterns: persistent left rail for primary navigation
breadcrumb for hierarchy depth beyond two levels
accessibility_posture: WCAG 2.2 AA enforced; full keyboard operability, visible focus rings, 4.5:1 text contrast, prefers-reduced-motion honoured, no information by colour alone
performance_posture: dashboard interactive within 2s on mid-tier hardware; virtualised tables beyond 100 rows; route-level code splitting; budget 200KB JS per route

framework_conventions.styling: design tokens via CSS variables, utility classes constrained to token scale
framework_conventions.state: server-state via query cache, optimistic mutations
rules: no arbitrary Tailwind bracket values; tokenised utilities only
components consume tokens, never raw hex or px

component_conventions.data_table: virtualised, sortable, sticky header, density toggle, keyboard row navigation
component_conventions.kpi_card: single metric, tabular figure, delta indicator, token spacing only
component_conventions.status_pill: semantic colour plus text label, never colour alone
rules: prefer one canonical component per role; duplicates are debt
every interactive component ships loading, empty, and error states

exceptions.reason: third-party canvas renderer cannot consume density tokens
